chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SCRA 285 of 2024 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on CMA No.1201/2024 2. For hearing of main case 3. For orders on CMA No.1202/2024 04.11.2025 Mr. Shahnawaz M. Sahito, advocate for the applicant Pursuant to last order, Ms. Amaara Durrani, Additional Collector, Collectorate of Customs East Karachi is present and states that the reference application may be dismissed as withdrawn. Order accordingly. A copy of this order may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Judge Judge Amjad
